languages.text: {n}Пристрелявшиеся лэнс-батареи не знали промаха. А меровский полк добивал искалеченных тварей, если вдруг чудовищам везло пережить удар. Вскоре популяция Погонщик значительно сократилась. Абеляр признал позднее, что эта кампания стала образцовым примером взаимодействия {g|Encyclopedia:ImperialNavyGlossary}Имперского флота{/g} и {g|Encyclopedia:AstraMilitarumGlossary}Астра Милитарум{/g}.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Пристрелявшиеся лэнс-батареи не знали промаха. А меровский полк добивал искалеченных тварей, если вдруг чудовищам везло пережить удар. Вскоре популяция Погонщик значительно сократилась. Абеляр признал позднее, что эта кампания стала образцовым примером взаимодействия {g|Encyclopedia:ImperialNavyGlossary}Имперского флота{/g} и {g|Encyclopedia:AstraMilitarumGlossary}Астра Милитарум{/g}.{/n}

languages.text: {n}The well-aimed lance batteries did not miss, and the Merovian Regiment would finish off any maimed creatures that happened to survive the strike. Before long, the Drover population was greatly diminished. Abelard later acknowledged that this campaign had been an exemplary model of cooperation between the {g|Encyclopedia:ImperialNavyGlossary}Imperial Navy{/g} and the {g|Encyclopedia:AstraMilitarumGlossary}Astra Militarum{/g}.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Пристрелявшиеся лэнс-батареи не знали промаха. А меровский полк добивал искалеченных тварей, если вдруг чудовищам везло пережить удар. Вскоре популяция Погонщик значительно сократилась. Абеляр признал позднее, что эта кампания стала образцовым примером взаимодействия {g|Encyclopedia:ImperialNavyGlossary}Имперского флота{/g} и {g|Encyclopedia:AstraMilitarumGlossary}Астра Милитарум{/g}.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}The zeroed lance batteries knew no miss, and the Merovian Regiment finished off the maimed creatures should any happen to survive the strike. Within a short time, the Drover population was greatly diminished. Abelard later acknowledged that this campaign had become an exemplary model of cooperation between the {g|Encyclopedia:ImperialNavyGlossary}Imperial Navy{/g} and the {g|Encyclopedia:AstraMilitarumGlossary}Astra Militarum{/g}.{/n}

{n}The well-aimed lance batteries did not miss, and the Merovian Regiment would finish off any maimed creatures that happened to survive the strike. Before long, the Drover population was greatly diminished. Abelard later acknowledged that this campaign had been an exemplary model of cooperation between the {g|Encyclopedia:ImperialNavyGlossary}Imperial Navy{/g} and the {g|Encyclopedia:AstraMilitarumGlossary}Astra Militarum{/g}.{/n}

{n}The lance gunners did not miss a single shot, while the Merov Regiment finished off the maimed creatures from fortified positions if the monsters had been lucky enough to survive the orbital strike. Abelard later described this campaign as a perfect example of cooperation between the Imperial Navy and the Astra Militarum.{/n}

{n}The zeroed lance batteries knew no miss, and the Merovian Regiment finished off the maimed creatures should any happen to survive the strike. Within a short time, the Drover population was greatly diminished. Abelard later acknowledged that this campaign had become an exemplary model of cooperation between the {g|Encyclopedia:ImperialNavyGlossary}Imperial Navy{/g} and the {g|Encyclopedia:AstraMilitarumGlossary}Astra Militarum{/g}.{/n}

{n}The well-aimed lance batteries did not miss, and the Merovian Regiment would finish off any maimed creatures that happened to survive the strike. Before long, the Drover population was greatly diminished. Abelard later acknowledged that this campaign had been an exemplary model of cooperation between the {g|Encyclopedia:ImperialNavyGlossary}Imperial Navy{/g} and the {g|Encyclopedia:AstraMilitarumGlossary}Astra Militarum{/g}.{/n}

languages.text: {n}ランス・ガンナーは一発も外さなかった。モンスターが幸運にも攻撃を生き延びたならば、メローヴ連隊が傷ついた生き物を仕留めた。アベラルドは後にこのキャンペーンを{g|Encyclopedia:ImperialNavyGlossary}帝国海軍{/g}と{g|Encyclopedia:AstraMilitarumGlossary}アストラ・ミリタム{/g}の協力の完璧な例として語った。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The lance gunners did not miss a single shot, while the Merov Regiment finished off the maimed creatures if the monsters had been lucky enough to survive the strike. Abelard later described this campaign as a perfect example of cooperation between the {g|Encyclopedia:ImperialNavyGlossary}Imperial Navy{/g} and the {g|Encyclopedia:AstraMilitarumGlossary}Astra Militarum{/g}.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}ランス・ガンナーは一発も外さなかった。モンスターが幸運にも攻撃を生き延びたならば、メローヴ連隊が傷ついた生き物を仕留めた。アベラルドは後にこのキャンペーンを帝国海軍とアストラ・ミリタムの協力の完璧な例として語った。{/n}
{n}ランス・ガンナーは一発も外さなかった。モンスターが幸運にも攻撃を生き延びたならば、メローヴ連隊が傷ついた生き物を仕留めた。アベラルドは後にこのキャンペーンを{g|Encyclopedia:ImperialNavyGlossary}帝国海軍{/g}と{g|Encyclopedia:AstraMilitarumGlossary}アストラ・ミリタム{/g}の協力の完璧な例として語った。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Las precisas baterías de lanzas no fallaron, y el regimiento de Merov remató a toda criatura mutilada que había sobrevivido. Con eso, la población de Pastores se redujo en gran medida. Abelard admitiría más tarde que esta campaña había sido un modelo ejemplar de cooperación entre la {g|Encyclopedia:ImperialNavyGlossary}Armada Imperial{/g} y el {g|Encyclopedia:AstraMilitarumGlossary}Astra Militarum{/g}.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The well-aimed lance batteries did not miss, and the Merovian Regiment would finish off any maimed creatures that happened to survive the strike. Before long, the Drover population was greatly diminished. Abelard later acknowledged that this campaign had been an exemplary model of cooperation between the {g|Encyclopedia:ImperialNavyGlossary}Imperial Navy{/g} and the {g|Encyclopedia:AstraMilitarumGlossary}Astra Militarum{/g}.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Las precisas baterías de lanzas no fallaron, y el regimiento de Merov remató a toda criatura mutilada que había sobrevivido. Con eso, la población de Pastores se redujo en gran medida. Abelard admitiría más tarde que esta campaña había sido un modelo ejemplar de cooperación entre la {g|Encyclopedia:ImperialNavyGlossary}Armada Imperial{/g} y el {g|Encyclopedia:AstraMilitarumGlossary}Astra Militarum{/g}.{/n}

languages.text: {n}光矛炮组弹无虚发，梅罗夫军团则负责清剿那些侥幸在轰击中存活下来、身受重创的怪物。没过多久，拒生花的数量便被大幅削减。事后，阿贝拉德评价道，这场战役堪称{g|Encyclopedia:ImperialNavyGlossary}帝国海军{/g}与{g|Encyclopedia:AstraMilitarumGlossary}星界军{/g}协同作战的完美典范。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The well-aimed lance batteries did not miss, and the Merovian Regiment would finish off any maimed creatures that happened to survive the strike. Before long, the Drover population was greatly diminished. Abelard later acknowledged that this campaign had been an exemplary model of cooperation between the {g|Encyclopedia:ImperialNavyGlossary}Imperial Navy{/g} and the {g|Encyclopedia:AstraMilitarumGlossary}Astra Militarum{/g}.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}光矛炮组弹无虚发，梅罗夫军团则负责清剿那些侥幸在轰击中存活下来、身受重创的怪物。没过多久，拒生花的数量便被大幅削减。事后，阿贝拉德评价道，这场战役堪称{g|Encyclopedia:ImperialNavyGlossary}帝国海军{/g}与{g|Encyclopedia:AstraMilitarumGlossary}星界军{/g}协同作战的完美典范。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Die präzise ausgerichteten Lanzenbatterien trafen ihre Ziele und das Merov-Regiment tötete alle verstümmelten Kreaturen, die den Angriff überlebten. Wenig später war die Population der Treiber deutlich geschwächt. Abelard bestätigte später, dass dieser Feldzug beispielhaft für die Kooperation der {g|Encyclopedia:ImperialNavyGlossary}imperialen Kriegsflotte{/g} mit dem {g|Encyclopedia:AstraMilitarumGlossary}Astra Militarum{/g} war.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The well-aimed lance batteries did not miss, and the Merovian Regiment would finish off any maimed creatures that happened to survive the strike. Before long, the Drover population was greatly diminished. Abelard later acknowledged that this campaign had been an exemplary model of cooperation between the {g|Encyclopedia:ImperialNavyGlossary}Imperial Navy{/g} and the {g|Encyclopedia:AstraMilitarumGlossary}Astra Militarum{/g}.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Die präzise ausgerichteten Lanzenbatterien trafen ihre Ziele und das Merov-Regiment tötete alle verstümmelten Kreaturen, die den Angriff überlebten. Wenig später war die Population der Treiber deutlich geschwächt. Abelard bestätigte später, dass dieser Feldzug beispielhaft für die Kooperation der {g|Encyclopedia:ImperialNavyGlossary}imperialen Kriegsflotte{/g} mit dem {g|Encyclopedia:AstraMilitarumGlossary}Astra Militarum{/g} war.{/n}

languages.text: {n}İyi nişanlanmış mızrak bataryaları hedeflerini ıskalamadı ve Merov Alayı, saldırıdan kurtulmayı başaran yaralı yaratıkların işini bitirdi. Çok geçmeden Çoban nüfusu büyük ölçüde azaldı. Abelard daha sonra bu seferin {g|Encyclopedia:ImperialNavyGlossary}İmparatorluk Donanması{/g} ile {g|Encyclopedia:AstraMilitarumGlossary}Astra Militarum{/g} arasında örnek bir iş birliği modeli olduğunu kabul etti.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The well-aimed lance batteries did not miss, and the Merovian Regiment would finish off any maimed creatures that happened to survive the strike. Before long, the Drover population was greatly diminished. Abelard later acknowledged that this campaign had been an exemplary model of cooperation between the {g|Encyclopedia:ImperialNavyGlossary}Imperial Navy{/g} and the {g|Encyclopedia:AstraMilitarumGlossary}Astra Militarum{/g}.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}İyi nişanlanmış mızrak bataryaları hedeflerini ıskalamadı ve Merov Alayı, saldırıdan kurtulmayı başaran yaralı yaratıkların işini bitirdi. Çok geçmeden Çoban nüfusu büyük ölçüde azaldı. Abelard daha sonra bu seferin {g|Encyclopedia:ImperialNavyGlossary}İmparatorluk Donanması{/g} ile {g|Encyclopedia:AstraMilitarumGlossary}Astra Militarum{/g} arasında örnek bir iş birliği modeli olduğunu kabul etti.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Les batteries de lances, parfaitement calibrées, firent mouche, et le régiment merovien s'affaira à finir le travail pour les quelques créatures restantes. En un rien de temps, la population de Chasseurs fut drastiquement réduite. Plus tard, Abélard décrivit cette campagne comme « un parfait exemple de coopération entre la {g|Encyclopedia:ImperialNavyGlossary}Marine Impériale{/g} et l'{g|Encyclopedia:AstraMilitarumGlossary}Astra Militarum{/g} ».{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The well-aimed lance batteries did not miss, and the Merovian Regiment would finish off any maimed creatures that happened to survive the strike. Before long, the Drover population was greatly diminished. Abelard later acknowledged that this campaign had been an exemplary model of cooperation between the {g|Encyclopedia:ImperialNavyGlossary}Imperial Navy{/g} and the {g|Encyclopedia:AstraMilitarumGlossary}Astra Militarum{/g}.{/n}

En un rien de temps, la population de Chasseurs fut drastiquement réduite. Plus tard, Abélard décrivit cette campagne comme « un parfait exemple de coopération entre la {g|Encyclopedia:ImperialNavyGlossary}Marine Impériale{/g} et l'{g|Encyclopedia:AstraMilitarumGlossary}Astra Militarum{/g} ».{/n}
